allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(d if isinstance\(d,dict\) else d[0]\)")

Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT user_id, provider, jsonb_array_length\(payload\) as event_count, fetched_at FROM cached_events WHERE user_id = 'default';")

Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT user_id, provider, jsonb_array_length\(payload\) as cnt, payload->0->>'title' as first_title FROM cached_events WHERE user_id='default';")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT user_id, provider, jsonb_typeof\(payload\), payload FROM cached_events WHERE user_id='default';")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT user_id, provider, jsonb_typeof\(payload\) FROM cached_events;")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT payload FROM cached_events WHERE user_id='default';")
Bash(psql "postgres://postgres:postgres@localhost:5432/unified_calendar" -c "SELECT user_id, provider, jsonb_typeof\(payload\), jsonb_array_length\(payload\) FROM cached_events;")
